summary: Tested SPHR Security Log app (Expo RN + FastAPI + MongoDB). All 5 backend pytest cases passed (managers GET/POST/DELETE, reports upsert+update, GET single+list, 404 on unknown). Full mobile UI flow verified end-to-end at mobile viewport 390x844: shift login -> add-manager modal -> start shift -> dashboard (sync-status='Saved offline') -> log-entry (timestamp locks on action input from 'Locks on action entry' to '04:22:18 am') -> GPS/photo/voice buttons present and tolerate web (no crash) -> save entry -> dashboard shows entry -> summary (total-patrols=1, sync='Synced to management', export/submit/end-shift buttons present).

minor.issue: Returns 200; conventionally 201 Created would be more correct. Non-blocking.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Animated: useNativeDriver is not supported' on web — cosmetic only, expected on Expo web.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — likely from a vendor lib, cosmetic.

action_items: Optional: return 201 from POST /api/managers and POST /api/reports for REST correctness.
Optional: silence/replace deprecated pointerEvents usage if it originates in app code (likely a library).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py correctly strips MongoDB _id before serializing responses.
Upsert /api/reports preserves created_at on update and refreshes synced_at — verified via 2-step test.
Env vars used correctly; backend uses MONGO_URL/DB_NAME and frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (process.env / Constants).
All interactive elements have testID attributes as expected by the spec — every flow could be exercised.
seed_data_creation: Added one TEST_UI_Mgr manager via UI for the modal test, then cleaned up via DELETE /api/managers/{id}. Created one TEST_ report (with TEST_ prefixed security/guard fields) via API for upsert test — left in DB (no DELETE endpoint exists for reports).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL = EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Seeded managers: 'Duty Manager', 'Resort Manager'. No /api/reports DELETE endpoint — TEST_ reports accumulate. Voice/GPS/photo buttons on web are no-ops but do not crash (graceful).
